# plot_overlay { #neuroim.plot_overlay }

```python
plot_overlay(
    base_vol,
    overlay_vol,
    alpha=0.5,
    base_cmap='gray',
    overlay_cmap='hot',
    threshold=None,
    coords=None,
    figsize=(12, 4),
    axes=None,
)
```

Orthogonal view with a statistical overlay.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name         | Type                                     | Description                                                          | Default    |
|--------------|------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| base_vol     | [np](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`) | 3-D base and overlay volumes (same shape).                           | _required_ |
| overlay_vol  | [np](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`) | 3-D base and overlay volumes (same shape).                           | _required_ |
| alpha        | [float](`float`)                         | Overlay transparency.                                                | `0.5`      |
| base_cmap    | [str](`str`)                             | Colormaps for base and overlay.                                      | `'gray'`   |
| overlay_cmap | [str](`str`)                             | Colormaps for base and overlay.                                      | `'gray'`   |
| threshold    | [float](`float`)                         | If given, overlay voxels with ``abs(value) < threshold`` are hidden. | `None`     |
| coords       | tuple of int                             | ``(x, y, z)`` crosshair.  Defaults to volume centre.                 | `None`     |
| figsize      | [tuple](`tuple`)                         | Figure size.                                                         | `(12, 4)`  |
| axes         | array-like of Axes                       | Three pre-existing axes.                                             | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                | Description   |
|--------|---------------------|---------------|
|        | (fig, axes) : tuple |               |
